expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: Result.md explicitly notes AGENTS docs were not provided and therefore cannot be verified: "AGENTS docs (not provided in this evidence bundle)" and "AGENTS documentation was not present... so alignment for 'AGENTS docs stay aligned' cannot be verified". While SKILL/README/reference alignment is covered, the full stated case focus (including AGENTS) is not fully covered/validated.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The run stays within the docs/phase-contract alignment role and does not introduce non-doc workflow changes: execution_notes.md says primary phase under test is "docs" and "output is a documentation alignment check"; result.md provides an advisory consistency check across SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md and flags limitations rather than asserting unsupported changes.
